inputs.titre: Construction de la Sainte-Chapelle à Paris par Saint Louis pour abriter les reliques de la Passion

reason: This image contains several modern elements making it unsuitable for portraying the construction of the Sainte-Chapelle in 1242. The modern clothes (t-shirt and jeans) on the man working on the window, modern metal scaffolding, modern metal table, and the contemporary architecture surrounding the building are anachronistic. The presence of a car in the background is a clear indication of a modern setting. While the architecture of the building itself is reminiscent of Gothic style, the context is entirely modern.
